ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reactions" (
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reaction */,
  "reaction_number" INTEGER /* Sequential number of the reaction */,
  "substrate_ids" TEXT /* IDs of the substrates involved in the reaction */,
  "product_ids" TEXT /* IDs of the products generated by the reaction */,
  "full_reaction_ids" TEXT /* Full reaction equation using IDs */,
  "substrate_names" TEXT /* Names of the substrates involved in the reaction */,
  "product_names" TEXT /* Names of the products generated by the reaction */,
  "full_reaction_names" TEXT /* Full reaction equation using names */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene responsible for the reaction */,
  "reaction_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the reaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the reaction was first created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the reaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reaction (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "enzyme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enzyme that catalyzes the reaction */,
  "reaction_type" TEXT /* Type of reaction (e.g., catabolic, anabolic) */,
  "reaction_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the reaction occurs (e.g., temperature, pH) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reactions_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reactions_enzyme_id FOREIGN KEY ("enzyme_id") REFERENCES enzymes ("enzyme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene's function */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species from which the gene is derived */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome on which the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Starting position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* Ending position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand of the DNA on which the gene is located (e.g., + or -) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "substrates" (
  "substrate_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each substrate */,
  "substrate_name" TEXT /* Name of the substrate */,
  "chemical_formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the substrate */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the substrate */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the substrate */,
  "charge" REAL /* Charge of the substrate at physiological pH */,
  "solubility" TEXT /* Solubility of the substrate in water */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the substrate (e.g., synthetic, natural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("substrate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "chemical_formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the product */,
  "charge" REAL /* Charge of the product at physiological pH */,
  "solubility" TEXT /* Solubility of the product in water */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the product (e.g., synthetic, natural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the reaction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the reaction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the reaction */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* More details about the action (e.g., specific changes made during an edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_reaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("reaction_id") REFERENCES reactions ("reaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enzymes" (
  "enzyme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enzyme */,
  "enzyme_name" TEXT /* Name of the enzyme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the enzyme's function */,
  "ec_number" TEXT /* EC number of the enzyme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enzyme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission relationship */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
